name: Broiled Filet Mignon
recipeIngredient: Tenderloin or fillet steak, each 1 1/4-inch thick (8 ounce weight at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the top of the steaks with the mixed butter and oil.
2. Broil for 4 minutes on each side for rare. Turn over, brush the other side with butter or oil.
3. Continue broiling for another 4 minutes on each side (cook until medium rare; about 5 to 7 minutes per side).
- Do not cook until well done.
Yield: 2 servings
